title: We could feed 14.5 billion with today’s cropland. Why aren’t we? | Project Drawdown®
snippet: Using croplands to feed people instead of cows and cars is a triple win for climate, biodiversity, and food security.

title: Brazil labor prosecutors target JBS over beef tied to slavery-like labor | AP News
snippet: Brazil's labor prosecutors have filed a lawsuit against meatpacking giant JBS, accusing it of buying cattle from farms where workers were held in slavery-like conditions.

title: ‘They want to keep denying us our rights’: workers in Vermont’s $5.4bn dairy industry fight for basic labor protections | Vermont | The Guardian
snippet: Migrant labor fuels much of Vermont’s dairy industry, but workers are exempt from minimum wage rules, overtime protections and the right to unionize
